name: Cloaked in the Night
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's {Counter} is increased by [StateArg1]%. Defense grants Temporary {Counter} equal to the wielder's DEF [StateArg2]%. In Boss Battles, this becomes 3 times the Temporary {Counter}. After {Death Resistance} triggers, deals {Fixed DMG} equal to the wielder's {Counter} stack count [StateArg3]% to all enemies.
